blockedUntil: Doe CSL simfabric bounded prefill+decode transcript for the same source program
Doe CSL reference parity gate promotion criteria pass
Cerebras hardware receipt binds the same reference receipt
claimBoundary.scope: Production Doppler INT4 PLE RDRR WebGPU prefill+decode transcript reference. It becomes Cerebras evidence only after Doe CSL simfabric and hardware receipts bind the same manifest, graph, weights, input set, per-step logits, and token IDs.

tolerancePolicy.notes: Exact sha256 identity is preferred when Doe CSL reproduces Doppler bit-for-bit; max_abs is the promotion tolerance when platform f32 reduction order differs.
